lines.raw: Lesson 91 | 第91课
Poor Ian! | 可怜的伊恩！

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Who wanted to sell the house?
lines.raw: Who wanted to sell the house? | 谁想卖掉房子？

lines.english: Has Ian sold his house yet?
lines.chinese: 伊恩把他的房子卖了吗？
lines.raw: Has Ian sold his house yet? | 伊恩把他的房子卖了吗？
Yes, he has. | 是的，他卖了。
He sold it last week. | 他上周卖的。

lines.english: Has he moved to his new house yet?
lines.raw: Has he moved to his new house yet? | 他搬到新家了吗？
No, not yet. | 不，还没有。
He's still here. | 他还在这儿。
He's going to move tomorrow. | 他明天就要搬家了。
When? Tomorrow morning? | 什么时候？明天早上吗？
No. Tomorrow afternoon. | 不，明天下午。
I'll miss him. | 我会想念他的。

lines.english: He has always been a good neighbour.
lines.raw: He has always been a good neighbour. | 他一直是个好邻居。
He's a very nice person. | 他是个很好的人。
We'll all miss him. | 我们都会想念他的。

lines.english: When will the new people move into this house?
lines.chinese: 新住户什么时候搬进这所房子？
lines.raw: When will the new people move into this house? | 新住户什么时候搬进这所房子？

lines.english: I think that they'll move in the day after tomorrow.
lines.chinese: 我想他们会在后天搬进来。
lines.raw: I think that they'll move in the day after tomorrow. | 我想他们会在后天搬进来。

lines.english: Will you see Ian today, Jenny?
lines.chinese: 珍妮，你今天会见到伊恩吗？
lines.raw: Will you see Ian today, Jenny? | 珍妮，你今天会见到伊恩吗？
Yes, I will. | 是的，我会的。
Please give him my regards. | 请代我向他问好。

lines.english: Poor Ian! He didn't want to leave this house.
lines.chinese: 可怜的伊恩！他不想离开这所房子。
lines.raw: Poor Ian! He didn't want to leave this house. | 可怜的伊恩！他不想离开这所房子。

lines.english: No, he didn't want to leave, but his wife did!
lines.chinese: 不，他不想走，但是他妻子想！
lines.raw: No, he didn't want to leave, but his wife did! | 不，他不想走，但是他妻子想！
